category_sources: Official repository https://github.com/sqlfluff/sqlfluff describes SQLFluff as a modular SQL linter and auto-formatter

display_name_sources: Official docs https://docs.sqlfluff.com/ and repository https://github.com/sqlfluff/sqlfluff use the name SQLFluff

tags_sources: Official repository notes support for SQL dialects and templated code
